<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get unread message counts per group"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/chat/unread-counts"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns unread counts for the groups you belong to. Groups with no
unread messages don't appear in the response.


<ParamsDetails>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./get-chat-unread-counts.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

>
